choices.text: You look like you haven't slept.

sure.speaker: Deputy Hayes
sure.text: Good. Keep it casual. Don't want anyone thinking we're having a conversation.

alright.speaker: Deputy Hayes
alright.text: Professionally? Fine. Personally? Working on it. Either way keep smiling.

sleep.speaker: Deputy Hayes
sleep.text: I haven't. Been watching the motel since six.

harlow_question.speaker: Deputy Hayes
harlow_question.text: The man staying at the motel. Federal plates on his car. You know him?

choices.text: He came into the station this morning.
Why are you watching the motel?

came_in_follow.speaker: Deputy Hayes
came_in_follow.text: Never mind. Don't answer that. Just... did he give you anything? Ask you to do anything?

choices.text: He mentioned some kind of test.

test_mention.speaker: Deputy Hayes
test_mention.text: Don't do it. Whatever it is. Say you will and then don't.

why_matter.speaker: Deputy Hayes
why_matter.text: Because the last two people that talked to someone like him aren't here anymore.

never_seen.speaker: Deputy Hayes
never_seen.text: Federal plates. Tinted windows. Been parked outside your station twice already.

why_motel.speaker: Deputy Hayes
why_motel.text: Because that's my job. And because something about this doesn't sit right.

farewell.speaker: Deputy Hayes
farewell.text: You didn't hear any of this from me. Clear?
